name: Chocolate Covered Cherries 3
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces chocolate chips (Optional: flaked coconut, sprinkles, chopped nuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix wafer crumbs, powdered sugar, and nuts.
2. Combine water, butter, corn syrup, and coffee in a separate bowl.
3. Add the wet mixture to the dry ingredients. Stir until well combined.
4. Shape approximately 1/2 tablespoon of the mixture around each cherry.
5. Cover and refrigerate for at least one hour.
6. Melt chocolate in the microwave (or using a double boiler).
7. Holding the stem, dip the coated cherries into the melted chocolate, ensuring they are completely covered.
8. Place the dipped cherries on a wire rack over wax paper.
9. After 5 minutes, garnish with optional sprinkles if desired.
10. Refrigerate until the chocolate has hardened.
Yield: 2 1/2 dozen
